hero.subtitleShort: Medical-grade diagnostics for hair and scalp. Precision hardware meets clinical intelligence.
hero.valueBody: Start in the browser with a selfie—deeper scans and tracking continue in the Lushair app.

precision.title: Clinical-grade precision
precision.subtitle: Three pillars of AI-powered diagnostics. Medical accuracy meets real-time insight.
precision.card1Desc: Precision mapping of growth patterns across scalp regions.
precision.card2Desc: Surface and texture cues to spot stress, oil, and inflammation risk.
precision.card3Desc: Micron-level cues for thickness and damage—actionable, not generic.

medical.title: Medical-Grade Home Analysis
medical.desc: Start with a free web analysis—no app required. Your full report and ongoing care sync to the Lushair app when you are ready.
medical.note: Try on the web first; download the app after your report for tracking and reminders.

tracking.title: AI Smart Tracking
tracking.desc: Long-term trends, reminders, and insights live in the Lushair mobile app—built for daily hair health.

personalized.desc: Selfie analysis powers your baseline; the in-app AI assistant refines picks and answers follow-up questions.

user1.name: Ms. Zhang

user2.name: Dr. Li
user2.content: API integration was very smooth, and customer satisfaction with our hair analysis services has increased significantly. The technical support team is also very professional.

user3.name: Manager Wang
user3.content: The SaaS platform has helped us improve customer experience and product sales. Now we can provide scientific hair care solutions for every customer.

results.finding1: High sebum levels detected, recommend oil-control shampoo

results.apiFailed: We could not complete the live API call from your browser (network, CORS, or server rules). Sample scores are shown below.
results.apiSelfieHint: This page POSTs your image to /file/selfieApi on your API host (override with VITE_LUSHAIR_API_BASE).
results.apiTrichoscopeHint: The interactive JSON hair/scalp API (image URL + signed request) uses POST /file/trichoscopeApi—see the documentation link below.
results.apiFieldHint: Responses may include follicle count, density, radii, terminal/vellus ratios, redness, oiliness, keratinocyte signal, dandruff, white-hair ratio, and more—see the docs.

insight1.title: Hair Density Improvement
insight1.desc: Your hair density continues to improve, which may be related to the nutritional hair mask you've been using recently. Recommend continuing your current care routine.

insight2.title: Scalp Health Needs Attention
insight2.desc: Detected decrease in scalp health score. Recommend reducing frequency of heat tool use and increasing scalp moisturizing care.

insight3.title: Care Recommendations
insight3.desc: Based on your hair type and current condition, recommend 2-3 deep treatments per week using gentle hair care products.

ingredients.title: Ingredient recommendations
ingredients.basedOn: Based on your hair and scalp profile
ingredients.card1: Supports barrier function and visible oil balance—common in leave-on scalp serums and tonics.
ingredients.card2: Humectant and soothing—helps dry or stressed scalps retain moisture without heavy residue.
ingredients.card3: Helps clarify buildup when used sparingly; ideal for oily or flaky-prone areas when tolerated.
ingredients.reason1: • Your readings suggest balancing scalp oil—niacinamide and gentle surfactants support that without stripping.
ingredients.reason2: • Mild inflammation signals benefit from soothing actives such as panthenol and allantoin in leave-on care.
ingredients.reason3: • For buildup and flakes, low-percentage salicylic acid can help—introduce slowly and patch test.

appIntro.title: Lushair app
appIntro.subtitle: The companion app for scalp and hair AI—track progress, get reminders, and turn your first web analysis into a long-term care plan.
appIntro.feature1Desc: See trends over time with automatic scan comparisons and clear charts.
appIntro.feature2Desc: Ask routine and care questions grounded in your profile and scan history.
appIntro.feature3Desc: Continue from your free web report—nothing is lost when you open the app.
appIntro.extra1: Fast scalp capture with guided photo flow and instant AI readouts aligned with our clinical models.
appIntro.extra2: Personalized care suggestions based on your metrics—not generic tips—so you know what to do next.
appIntro.extra3: Works with our analyzers and web tools so salons, clinics, and individuals stay on one consistent journey.
appIntro.storesNote: App Store and Google Play links will appear here when published.
appIntro.tryWeb: Run a free web analysis first

shop.title: Lushair Hair Analyzers
shop.subtitle: Professional AI-powered hair analysis devices for personal and professional use

lushairOne.name: Lushair One
lushairOne.desc: Wireless scalp analyzer with AI: complete a scan in seconds and get 16+ hair and scalp metrics with personalized care tips. Compact and portable—connect via Wi‑Fi, capture guided photos, and review results anywhere (aligned with lushair.ai Lushair Scalp Explorer).

lushairPro.name: Lushair Pro
lushairPro.desc: Tri-spectral auto-focus (coming soon). Join the waitlist—ideal for deeper scalp insight when we launch.

lushairStudioWifiScreen.name: Lushair Studio (Wi‑Fi screen)
lushairStudioWifiScreen.desc: Three-spectrum, auto focus, optional 200X LED. Wi‑Fi with integrated screen for professional workflows.

lushairStudioPlugIn.name: Lushair Studio (wired screen)
lushairStudioPlugIn.desc: Professional grade with plug-in (wired) screen. Three-spectrum analysis with optional high magnification for clinics and salons.

lushairStudioMirror.name: Lushair Studio (Wi‑Fi mirror)
lushairStudioMirror.desc: Premium mirror design with Wi‑Fi display. Three-spectrum analysis with salon-grade aesthetics.

studio.title: Lushair Studio Customization Options
studio.subtitle: Professional-grade device with flexible configuration options for clinics, salons, and retail environments
